changes: Holmgang: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Power Slash: Reduction to target's HP recovered by healing magic has been increased from 10% to 15%.
The Blackest Night: Recast time has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Chaos Thrust: Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 15%.
Demolish: Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 15%.
Yukikaze: Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 15%.
Hissatsu: Soten: Recast time has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds.
Shadow Fang: Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 15%.
Wither: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Assize: The effect 'Reduces Assize recast time by a percentage corresponding to the number of healing Lilies stacked at time of action execution' has been removed.
Assize: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 30 seconds.
Adloquium: Effect duration has been reduced from 15 to 10 seconds.
Essential Dignity: Recast time has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.

new_content.name: Omega: Sigmascape (Savage)
new_content.description: Battle instance featuring the Echo buff, which increases maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.

new_content.name: Eureka Pagos
new_content.description: Exploration zone where the rate of accumulating vitiated aether has been increased.

new_content.name: The Feast (Season Ten)
new_content.description: PvP competitive season where top solo combatants receive special rewards.

new_content.name: Duty Recorder
new_content.description: System feature that can now be used in Alphascape V4.0 (Savage).

new_content.name: Alphascape V4.0 (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid instance that now supports the Duty Recorder.

housing.name: Wooden Showcase
housing.description: An indoor furnishing item mentioned in relation to a recipe change.

housing.name: Brick Garden Circle
housing.description: An outdoor furnishing item that was previously unobtainable.

housing.name: Birdbath
housing.description: An outdoor furnishing item mentioned as part of a two-item set with the Brick Garden Circle from the FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest.

glamour.name: Yanxian Merchant's Haori
glamour.description: A chest piece that had an issue preventing it from being used for glamour, which has been resolved in Patch 4.41.
